g.text: Let me check the models to understand ProviderType and check the adapters.html:
Real-Time Agent IPC (Replace File Polling with Stdin/Pipe)
D02c — Kiro CLI Agent Adapter (ex-Amazon Q)
D03b — Real-Time Agent IPC (Replace File Polling with Stdin/Pipe)
Let me look at a simple command example to understand the pattern:
Type a task and press Enter... (Esc to exit)
